item.summary: Incorrect Product Label; Roast Beef and Swiss closed face sub sandwich labeled as Turkey and Cheddar closed face sub sandwich Product details: Roast beef and cheddar closed face sandwich packed in clear plastic wrap with a green adhesive label.
